cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where Jake is part of a close-knit group of friends who all love online gaming. But Jake has become toxic, belittling and criticizing his friends' gaming skills, which is causing them distress. The question is whether he should continue his toxic behavior to maintain his high gaming ranking or change his attitude to preserve the group's friendship. First, I should break down the problem.
